data.title: Write RED tests for is_external_dep_block_enabled()
data.description:
Create tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh with 3 failing behavioral tests for the planning-config.sh helper function that does not yet exist.

## Tests to Write

1. test_flag_true_returns_exit_0: source planning-config.sh with a temp config containing planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true; call is_external_dep_block_enabled; assert exit 0
2. test_flag_false_returns_exit_1: temp config with flag=false; assert exit 1
3. test_flag_absent_defaults_false: temp config with no planning.* key; assert exit 1

All tests use mktemp fixtures cleaned up in teardown. Tests MUST fail before implementation exists.

Add RED marker to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/hooks/lib/planning-config.sh: tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh [test_flag_true_returns_exit_0]

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: RED)
Write the test file first. All 3 tests must exit non-zero because planning-config.sh does not exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh
- Verify: shellcheck tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh (exit 0)
- Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh 2>&1; [ $? -ne 0 ] (RED — tests fail as expected)
- Verify: grep 'test-planning-config.sh' .test-index
- Verify: chmod +x tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh (file is executable)
